description: history attribute — restore on re-entry (§51.0.N). <Playing history> carries a composite inner engine. Drive inner to .Battle (#fight), exit the composite to .Title (#quit), then re-enter via the structured target .Playing.history (#resume). The inner engine RESTORES its last-active variant (.Battle) from the synthesized history cell rather than resetting to initial= (.Exploring). Contrast engine-history-fresh-reset-rt (bare .Playing target ignores history).
rationale: §51.0.N a composite state-child with history restores its inner engine's last variant on re-entry via the .Variant.history target; on outer-exit the inner variant is written to the synth history cell and restored on .Playing.history re-entry.
